reforms.description: The government introduced a package of expansionary measures to support employment, including state investment projects and subsidies to municipalities for purchasing industrial goods.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The measures aim to stimulate employment and economic activity through state investment and subsidies.
reforms.status_evidence: The measures have been put into effect to support employment.
reforms.importance_rationale: The measures are significant but not structural, focusing on employment support.
reforms.source_quote: Package of expansionary measures to support employment, totalling Kr. 1.5 billion, introduced including: State investment projects (Kr. 200 million) brought forward; subsidies (20 per cent) to municipalities advancing purchases of industrial goods.

reforms.description: The government proposed measures to increase State credit institutes' lending capacity to small and medium-sized firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing lending capacity for SMEs is expected to facilitate their growth and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The proposed measures have been enacted to support lending to SMEs.
reforms.importance_rationale: The measures are significant for supporting small and medium enterprises but do not represent a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Government proposes measures to increase State credit institutes' lending capacity to small and medium sized firms.
